policy: A shard should use at least two runtimes when it contains three or more Web challenges.
Do not select Python when the matrix row names another runtime.
Pin dependencies and expose a deterministic health endpoint.
The exploit must reach the running service and obtain the flag; no offline fallback is allowed.

pwn.required_artifact: Linux ELF plus single-service Docker image
policy: Record PIE, NX, RELRO, canary, and stripped status.
Compile the distributed ELF during generation.
The exploit must target the built ELF or running TCP service.
Unless the matrix explicitly requests another format, compile a Linux amd64 ELF.
Source code alone or a README placeholder in attachments/ is not a deliverable.
The solve script must derive the flag from the distributed artifact, not from source or metadata.
Record compiler, flags, SHA-256, file format, and architecture.
